# SCORE Taxes and Compliance for Operations

Last reviewed for BOSS Library ingestion: 2026-06-21

## BOSS Library tags
score, manage-grow, operations-and-growth

## Resource purpose
Taxes and compliance education for existing businesses.

## How the BOSS AI Librarian should use this resource
Use when an operating business needs general education about tax/compliance obligations and recordkeeping.

## Best-fit BOSS lifecycle stage
Operations and Growth

## Route the user here when
The user asks operational tax/compliance questions.

## BOSS routing notes
- Do not give final tax/legal advice. Route to CPA/attorney/official agencies.

## Related SCORE links
- Manage + Grow hub: https://www.score.org/manage-grow/
- Find a mentor: https://www.score.org/mentors/

## Response pattern for BOSS
Use this resource as a routing destination, not as a substitute for professional legal, tax, lending, procurement, or compliance advice. For time-sensitive workshops, deadlines, prices, contact details, or eligibility rules, send the user to the live source URL first.
